description: Schema-validated governance card that binds a rescue task contract to its checked-in governance artifacts.

required_fields.name: contract_path
required_fields.description: Repo-relative path to the rescue task contract artifact.

required_fields.name: governance_status
required_fields.description: Whether the task card is an example, planned, or active artifact.

required_fields.name: owner
required_fields.description: Responsible owner for the rescue task data lane.

required_fields.name: summary
required_fields.description: Short governance summary for the rescue task.

required_fields.name: leakage_boundary_policy_id
required_fields.description: Leakage policy enforced by the rescue task contract.

required_fields.name: dataset_card_paths
required_fields.description: Repo-relative paths to the checked-in rescue dataset cards.

required_fields.name: freeze_manifest_paths
required_fields.description: Repo-relative paths to the checked-in rescue freeze manifests.

required_fields.name: split_manifest_paths
required_fields.description: Repo-relative paths to the checked-in rescue split manifests.

required_fields.name: lineage_paths
required_fields.description: Repo-relative paths to the checked-in raw-to-frozen lineage artifacts.
